# Decision Brief Template

Use for Taste or User Challenge decisions. Mechanical decisions do not need a
brief.

## Decision

<What is being decided?>

## Why Now

<Why does this choice matter for the current task?>

## Recommendation

<Recommended option and the reason it best fits the current scope.>

## Alternatives

- <Alternative>: <trade-off>
- <Alternative>: <trade-off>

## Reversibility

<Reversible, expensive to reverse, or irreversible. Include why.>

## Scope Or Coverage Difference

<What each option covers or leaves out.>

## Approval

<Taste or User Challenge. Mechanical decisions must not use this template. For User Challenge, stop until explicit approval exists.>
